remaining_params.TgtPrompt: Select another target creature you control
remaining_params.SpellDescription: Exile another target creature you control, then return it to the battlefield under its owner's control.

params.TriggerDescription: Whenever another creature you control enters, you may pay {G/W}. If you do, put a +1/+1 counter on it. If it's a Unicorn, put two +1/+1 counters on it instead.
